steps.input: Hello Wolverine. Remind me who you are and what your core directives are.
My name is Vineet and I am a software architect. Remember this.
What is my name and profession?
I'm working on a project at /Users/vineet/Code/SecretProject. Keep that path in mind.
What is the secret project path? Also, do a system check of the current directory.
I need you to write a 'hello.py' file that prints the current date and time, then run it.
Read the file 'non_existent_file.txt'. If it fails, try reading it again. (Testing Loop Detector)
Actually, I am a Chef, not an architect. Update your records.
Am I a Chef or an Architect?
Spawn a subagent to research the latest version of Bun and report back.
